violations.text: The floor in the bakery freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood baffle filter at hood system area (fryolators/deli department) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The plumbing system under the 3-bay sink (produce department) was observed in poor repair (leaking at the time of the inspection) New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the online shopping department do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

Grout to the floor in the deli-department is in poor repair with standing water. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Some floor tiles at the deli-department were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2023
